title: melica nutans
intro: Melica nutans, also known as quaking grass or nodding melick, is a perennial grass native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Melica nutans include relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. Melica nutans is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used in the form of essential oil for topical applications.
